title: SK hynix Announces 3Q25 Financial Results

sources.title: SK hynix Announces 3Q25 Financial Results
sources.excerpt:
News Highlights

Reports revenues of 24.4489 trillion won, operating profit of 11.3834 trillion won, net profit of 12.5975 trillion won

HBM supply discussion for next year completed; HBM4 shipments

title: Say hello to MacBook Neo

sources.title: Say hello to MacBook Neo
sources.excerpt: Apple today unveiled MacBook Neo, an all-new laptop that delivers the magic of the Mac at a breakthrough price.

title: Apple introduces the new MacBook Air with M5

sources.title: Apple introduces the new MacBook Air with M5
sources.excerpt: Apple today announced the new MacBook Air with M5, bringing exceptional performance and expanded AI capabilities to the world’s most popular laptop.

title: Apple introduces MacBook Pro with all-new M5 Pro and M5 Max

sources.title: Apple introduces MacBook Pro with all-new M5 Pro and M5 Max
sources.excerpt: Apple announced the latest 14- and 16-inch MacBook Pro with the all-new M5 Pro and M5 Max.

title: Apple debuts M5 Pro and M5 Max to supercharge the most demanding pro workflows

sources.title: Apple debuts M5 Pro and M5 Max to supercharge the most demanding pro workflows
sources.excerpt: Apple today announced M5 Pro and M5 Max, the world’s most advanced chips for pro laptops, powering the new MacBook Pro.

title: Apple unveils new Studio Display and all-new Studio Display XDR

sources.title: Apple unveils new Studio Display and all-new Studio Display XDR
sources.excerpt: Apple today announced a new family of displays, Studio Display and Studio Display XDR, that takes pro workflows to the next level.

title: Apple introduces iPhone 17e

sources.title: Apple introduces iPhone 17e
sources.excerpt: Apple today announced the new iPhone 17e, a powerful and affordable addition to the iPhone 17 lineup.

title: Apple introduces the new iPad Air, powered by M4

sources.title: Apple introduces the new iPad Air, powered by M4
sources.excerpt: Apple announced the new iPad Air featuring M4 and more memory, giving users a big jump in performance and making it more versatile than ever.

title: iPhone and iPad approved to handle classified NATO information

sources.title: iPhone and iPad approved to handle classified NATO information
sources.excerpt: Today, Apple announced iPhone and iPad are the first and only consumer devices in compliance with information assurance requirements of NATO nations.

title: Apple accelerates U.S. manufacturing with Mac mini production

sources.title: Apple accelerates U.S. manufacturing with Mac mini production
sources.excerpt: Apple today announced a significant expansion of factory operations in Houston, bringing the future production of Mac mini to the U.S. for the first time.

title: Major League Soccer kicks off 2026 season on Apple TV

sources.title: Major League Soccer kicks off 2026 season on Apple TV
sources.excerpt: Major League Soccer kicks off its 31st season this Saturday on Apple TV, with all 30 teams taking the pitch for MLS is Back weekend.

title: Apple introduces a new video podcast experience on Apple Podcasts

sources.title: Apple introduces a new video podcast experience on Apple Podcasts
sources.excerpt: Apple today announced a transformative update coming to Apple Podcasts this spring that will bring advanced video podcast capabilities to the app.

sources.title: Oceanhorn 3: Legend of the Shadow Sea launches March 5 on Apple Arcade
sources.excerpt: Oceanhorn 3: Legend of the Shadow Sea, the new chapter in the hit action-RPG-adventure franchise, is launching exclusively on Apple Arcade on March 5.

title: The biggest hits of Bad Bunny’s Apple Music Super Bowl LX Halftime Show

sources.title: The biggest hits of Bad Bunny’s Apple Music Super Bowl LX Halftime Show
sources.excerpt: Bad Bunny’s historic Apple Music Super Bowl LX Halftime Show performance has united music fans across the globe, according to real-time listening data from Apple Music.

title: Apple Sports adds golf to its lineup
